campbell.title: Campbell City Council — April 21, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss and vote on changes to business license tax rates in the city. Shannon Dragman from the Finance Department presented the annual update to these rates, which would be included in a new city ordinance. The council deliberated on the proposal and made a decision during the public meeting.
keyTopics: Business license tax rate increases (annual update)
Changes to Campbell Municipal Code
Finance Department presentation on tax impacts
Public council deliberation and voting

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing to get community input on a proposed new rule or policy. After listening to residents, the council moved forward with the proposal by skipping the usual first reading step and planning to vote on it at their next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held for community input
Ordinance (new city rule) being fast-tracked for approval
Vote scheduled for next regular council meeting
First reading waived to speed up the process

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 21, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on April 21, 2026, to approve meeting minutes from their previous session and review the city's finances for February. The council authorized the town manager to sign several construction and service contracts, including work with QLM, Inc., and approved planning for upcoming town improvements.
keyTopics: Approved financial reports showing city money and investments for February 2026
Authorized construction contracts with external companies
Approved plans for town infrastructure improvements
Signed off on professional service agreements

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 27, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council reviewed progress reports on several major city initiatives, including updates on planning projects across the city, the Team San José economic development program, upcoming 2026 events, and the city's economic growth strategy. These reports show how the city is doing on its goals for development, business growth, and hosting events this year.
keyTopics: Citywide planning projects and development activities
Team San José economic development program progress
2026 major events scheduled for the city
Annual economic strategy and business growth plans

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 27, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a meeting on April 27, 2026 that allowed residents to participate both in person and online through Zoom. Residents who wanted to speak during public comment could join the virtual meeting and use the 'raise hand' feature to request to address the Council.
keyTopics: Virtual meeting access via Zoom for residents
Public comment procedures for online and phone participants
Meeting conducted with hybrid in-person and remote options

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 27, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special meeting on April 27, 2026, to interview candidates for various city boards and commissions. Residents had the opportunity to provide feedback both in person and online during the public comment period before the meeting ended.
keyTopics: Board and commission candidate interviews
In-person public comment from residents
Online participation options for community input
Filling open positions on city boards and commissions

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 27, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council held an Audit Committee meeting where residents were given the opportunity to speak about any issues they wanted to bring up (limited to 3 minutes each). The council approved the notes from their January meeting and reviewed a report on how well the city's retirement and health benefit trust funds performed during the first quarter of 2026.
keyTopics: Public comment period for residents on any city matters
Approval of January 26 meeting minutes
Retirement and health benefit fund performance report (Q1 2026)
OPEB & Pension Section 115 Trust investments update

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council met to discuss allowing large promotional signs to be displayed on buildings around Levi's Stadium during the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The council also worked on finalizing a new employment agreement with the city's firefighters for 2026-2029.
keyTopics: Temporary large signs (supergraphics) approved for World Cup 2026 events at Levi's Stadium
New 3-year labor agreement negotiated with Santa Clara firefighters
One agenda item was withdrawn by staff before the meeting

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 21, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held meetings on April 21, 2026 to approve the city's budget and fees for the upcoming fiscal year, discuss tax responsibility policies, and review plans to address homelessness in Santa Clara County. The council also reviewed previous meeting minutes and scheduled upcoming agenda items.
keyTopics: FY 2026-27 budget and development fees approval
Tax Equity and Fiscal Responsibility Act reissuance
Santa Clara County homelessness prevention plan presentation
User fees and utility rate updates
Meeting schedule and previous minutes review

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 23, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council reviewed a request to reconsider a tree removal permit that was already approved for 751 Waverley Street. Someone is asking the Planning Director to take another look at the decision to allow protected trees to be cut down on this property.
keyTopics: Protected tree removal permit for 751 Waverley Street
Request to reconsider an already-approved permit decision
Planning Director review process
